items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific requirement 'Different hours per location', but the provided evidence does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the operating hours for each location. While the linked use case mentions that different services are offered at different locations, it does not provide concrete evidence of varying hours. Therefore, without specific evidence to confirm or deny this requirement, the assessment remains inconclusive.
